rag_rules: AGREE guarantee statements must be placed in component types, not implementations
AGREE assume statements must be placed in component types, not implementations
generic_rules: Only use visible AADL features or helpers declared in the same annex when writing AGREE contracts
Move implementation-specific bindings to implementation annexes, not type annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
AGREE scalar types are int, real, and bool, not integer or boolean
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee or assume statements in component implementation annexes
Do not reference implementation-level paths in component type contracts
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
